creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Best ramen in Copenhagen? 👀

📍Mr Ramen, Studiestræde 67, 1554 København

Mr Ramen near Vesterport & Tivoli has been a staple go-to place for a quick bowl of ramen since 2015.

I enjoyed this very much. There’s a good Irish pub nearby as well (The Shamrock Inn) btw 🤠

#copenhagen #copenhagenfood

transcription.text: Day 49 of trying the top food places in Copenhagen. In the heart of the snowy city right next to the famous Palace Cinema we've got Mr. Ramen. A restaurant that opened back in 2015 so I believe they were one of the first proper ramen restaurants here in Denmark. I love it when a restaurant has a small menu and has perfected their dishes and that's definitely the case right here. The pork belly bar was so tasty but I do think that the pickle took over a bit too much. However the tonkotsu ramen was absolutely spot-on so Mr. Ramen in Copenhagen is still an excellent place to go for a quick lunch in the city center.
